modelIdentification.name: UCATT LSS FOM Extension E8 Module
modelIdentification.description: This module provides object class and interaction class definitions for representing DO objects and interactions composing the UCATT E8 interface, enabling the exchange of data between systems.
modelIdentification.useHistory: Removed errendus UFOM ENUM dependencies to RPR-FOM

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2015 Standard for Real-time Platform Reference Federation Object Model

objectClass.name: DOAircraft
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Aircraft is an entity of type air asset (UAV, Helicopter, Plane etc.)

attribute.name: CBRNEContaminated
attribute.semantics: DO is contaminated but still operational, can be recovered by decontamination. Decontamination is possible by staying in decontamination area (DODecontaminationArea), by umpire, or by EXCON.

attribute.name: CBRNEAreaObjectID
attribute.semantics: What area the DO has been contaminated by. The area identifier is used if necessary to reference the CBRN attributes.

attribute.name: AdvancedDamageState
attribute.semantics: The extended damage state for live platform entities

attribute.name: AdvancedProtectivePlatformMeasures
attribute.semantics: Protective gears available by DO in active use. The array should be updated when the DO applies active use of one or more protective measure(s), and removed when deactivated.

objectClass.name: DOAmphibiousVehicle
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Amphibious Vehicle is an entity with amphibious capabilities (hovercrafts, AAVs etc.)

attribute.name: AdvancedDamageState
attribute.semantics: The extended damagestate for live platform entities

attribute.name: CBRNEContaminated
attribute.semantics: DO is contaminated but still operational, can be recovered by decontamination. Decontamination is possible by staying in decontamination area (DODecontaminationArea), by umpire, or by EXCON.

attribute.name: CBRNEAreaObjectID
attribute.semantics: What area the DO has been contaminated by. The area identifier is used if necessary to reference the CBRN attributes.

attribute.name: AdvancedProtectivePlatformMeasures
attribute.semantics: Protective gears available by DO in active use. The array should be updated when the DO applies active use of one or more protective measure(s), and removed when deactivated.

objectClass.name: DOGroundVehicle
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Ground Vehicle is an entity of type tracked or wheeled vehicles (MBT, IFV, APC, trucks etc.)

attribute.name: AdvancedDamageState
attribute.semantics: The extended damagestate for live platform entities

attribute.name: CBRNEContaminated
attribute.semantics: DO is contaminated but still operational, can be recovered by decontamination. Decontamination is possible by staying in decontamination area (DODecontaminationArea), by umpire, or by EXCON.

attribute.name: CBRNEAreaObjectID
attribute.semantics: What area the DO has been contaminated by. The area identifier is used if necessary to reference the CBRN attributes.

attribute.name: AdvancedProtectivePlatformMeasures
attribute.semantics: Protective gears available by DO in active use. The array should be updated when the DO applies active use of one or more protective measure(s), and removed when deactivated.

attribute.name: MineClearingActive
attribute.semantics: Is the DO capable of clearing (land) mines and so doing it actively.

objectClass.name: DOSurfaceVessel
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Surface Vessel is an entity of type ship or boat.

attribute.name: AdvancedDamageState
attribute.semantics: The extended damagestate for live platform entities

attribute.name: CBRNEContaminated
attribute.semantics: Surface vessel DO is contaminated but still operational, can be recovered by decontamination. The details are handled by DO AdvancedDamageState enums.DO is contaminated but still operational, can be recovered by decontamination. Decontamination is possible by staying in decontamination area (DODecontaminationArea), by umpire, or by EXCON.

attribute.name: CBRNEAreaObjectID
attribute.semantics: What area the DO has been contaminated by. The area identifier is used if necessary to reference the CBRN attributes.

attribute.name: AdvancedProtectivePlatformMeasures
attribute.semantics: Protective gears available by DO and in active use by the DO. The array should be updated when the DO applies active use of one or more protective measure(s), and removed when deactivated.

attribute.name: MineClearingActive
attribute.semantics: Is the DO capable of clearing (sea) mines and so doing it actively.

objectClass.name: DOPlayer
objectClass.semantics: The Dynamic Object Player represents a human exercise participant instrumented with live simulation equipment.

attribute.name: AdvancedDamageState
attribute.semantics: The extended damagestate for live lifeform entities

attribute.name: CBRNContaminated
attribute.semantics: Player DO is contaminated, can be recovered by decontamination if still alive. The details are handled by AdvancedDamageState attribute. Decontamination is possible by staying in decontamination area (DODecontaminationArea), by umpire, or by EXCON.

attribute.name: CBRNAreaObjectID
attribute.semantics: What area the DO has been contaminated by. The area identifier is used if necessary to reference the CBRN attributes.

attribute.name: ProtectiveHelmet
attribute.semantics: If DO is wearing a protective helmet or not. Type is handled by attribute ProtectiveLifeformMeasures.

attribute.name: ProtectiveMask
attribute.semantics: If DO is wearing a protective mask or not. Type is handled by attribute ProtectiveLifeformMeasures.

attribute.name: ProtectiveVest
attribute.semantics: If DO is wearing a protective vest or not. Type is handled by attribute ProtectiveLifeformMeasures.

attribute.name: ProtectiveSuit
attribute.semantics: If DO is wearing a protective suit or not. Type is handled by attribute ProtectiveLifeformMeasures.

attribute.name: ProtectiveLifeformMeasures
attribute.semantics: What protective gears that the DO has the ability to use. Active use is determined by the Boolean values of the attributes ProtectiveHelmet, (...)Mask, (...)Vest, (...)Suite.

attribute.name: Indoors
attribute.semantics: True if position of the DO is indoors (only low quality or no GPS available). Default value is false.

attribute.name: MountedOnPlatform
attribute.semantics: Indicates if an (mechanized) infantryman is mounted on an APC or IFV. The attribute should also be used if a DOPlayer (e.g. soldier, civilian) is tethered to any platform (e.g. truck).

objectClass.name: DOObserverController
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object ObserverController represents an umpire observer/controller.

objectClass.name: DONonHuman
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object NonHuman represents a nonhuman exercise participant ( i.e. animals) instrumented with live simulation equipment.

attribute.name: AdvancedDamageState
attribute.semantics: The extended damagestate for live lifeform entities

attribute.name: CBRNContaminated
attribute.semantics: Player DO is contaminated, can be recovered by decontamination if still alive. The details are handled by AdvancedDamageState attribute. Decontamination is possible by staying in decontamination area (DODecontaminationArea), by umpire, or by EXCON.

attribute.name: CBRNAreaObjectID
attribute.semantics: What area the DO has been contaminated by. The area identifier is used if necessary to reference the CBRN attributes.

attribute.name: MountedOnPlatform
attribute.semantics: Indicates if a DONonHuman is tethered to any platform (e.g. truck).

objectClass.name: DOMissile
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Missile is an entity of type missile.

attribute.name: AdvancedDamageState
attribute.semantics: The extended damage state for live platform entities

attribute.name: ProtectivePlatformMeasures
attribute.semantics: Protective gears available by DO. The array should be updated when the DO applies active use of one or more protective measure, and removed when deactivated.

attribute.name: FuseType
attribute.semantics: DO Fuse type

attribute.name: MunitionType
attribute.semantics: DO Missile type

attribute.name: WarheadType
attribute.semantics: DO Carried warhead

objectClass.name: DOJammer
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Jammer/spoofer is able to affect other DO's. The operational status of the jammer is handled by the HostObjectIdentifiers Advanced Damage State.

attribute.name: AffectedDOs
attribute.semantics: This array contains the affected DO by the jammer.

objectClass.name: DOFieldEngineering
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Field Engineering represents a field engineering area.

attribute.name: EmplacerIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Reference to whom or what initiated the field engineering task.

attribute.name: ActivationTime
attribute.semantics: The instance in time when the area is/should be activated Time sec. since 1.1.1970 (POSIX)

attribute.name: DeactivationTime
attribute.semantics: The instance in time when the area is/should be deactivated Time sec. since 1.1.1970 (POSIX)

objectClass.name: DOMinefieldBreach
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Minefield Breach represents a breach in a minefield.

attribute.name: BreachedType
attribute.semantics: Kind of breach used to clear (fully or partially) the minefield.

objectClass.name: DOObstacleArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Obstacle Area represents an obstacle area, and may be used for tampering effects on DOs.

attribute.name: ObstacleType
attribute.semantics: The type of obstacle.

attribute.name: SurmountableBy
attribute.semantics: This attribute is using the same ENUM as the obstacle breach object. So anything below the ENUM table category is allowed to pass without penalties. E.g. if surmountable by tracked vehicles, personnel should also be able to pass through without any penalties.

objectClass.name: DOObstacleAreaBreach
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Obstacle Area Breach represents a breach of an obstacle area.

attribute.name: BreachedType
attribute.semantics: Kind of breach used to clear (fully or partially) the obstacle.

objectClass.name: DOMinefield
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Minefield represents a minefield.

attribute.name: MinefieldIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Uniquely identifies this minefield instance in association with the federates site and application. This attribute is optional, because this information is already covered by «ObjectIdentifier» of the RPR-FOM EnvironmentObject object class.

attribute.name: MinefieldLocation
attribute.semantics: Optional attribute. Specifies the location of the centre of the minefield The area of the minfields is covered by «PointsData» of the RPR-FOM ArealObject object class.

attribute.name: MinefieldOrientation
attribute.semantics: Optional attribute. Specifies the orientation of the minefield, with Euler angles.

attribute.name: MinefieldType
attribute.semantics: Specifies the minefield type (Mixed, Antipersonnel, Antitank).

attribute.name: MineTypes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the type of each mine contained within the minefield

attribute.name: MineTypeDensity
attribute.semantics: Minefield density is measured in mines per square meter

objectClass.name: DOCBRNEArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object CBRNE Area represents a CBRNE area in general.

attribute.name: InitatiorID
attribute.semantics: The identification of the DO that initiated the CBRN area. However, just like artillery, it can also be unit identification, since a CBRN area can be caused by one or more actors. When applicable, it is used for monitoring purposes.

attribute.name: ActiviationTime
attribute.semantics: The instance in time when the fire CBRNE is activated Time sec. since 1.1.1970 (POSIX)

attribute.name: DeactivationTime
attribute.semantics: The instance in time when the fire CBRNE is activated Time sec. since 1.1.1970 (POSIX)

attribute.name: EngagementTime
attribute.semantics: The elapsed time in seconds after activation the CBRN field should be deactivated (if no deactivation time is specified)

objectClass.name: DOChemicalAgentArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Chemical Agent Area represents a C-Area.

attribute.name: AgentType
attribute.semantics: This value should refer to the Ref to SISO-REF-010-2015 Enumerations for Simulation Interoperability V21; 17.3.1 Warhead, Munition Descriptor, stating the 4 digit code identifying the agent type, e.g. 8110, in this case the HD Mustard

attribute.name: AgentDensity
attribute.semantics: The amount of agent per volume, expressed as parts per million.

objectClass.name: DOBiologicalAgentArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Biological Agent Area represents a B-Area.

attribute.name: AgentType
attribute.semantics: The type of agent the DOBiologicalAgentArea contains. Ref to SISO-REF-010-2015 Enumerations for Simulation Interoperability V21; 17.3.1 Warhead, Munition Descriptor, stating the 4 digit code identifying the agent type, e.g. 9300, in this case the Rickettsia

objectClass.name: DONuclearArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Nuclear Area represents a nuclear area. It holds a (temporary) nuclear area, typically a nuclear detonation. It should be replaced after a while with a radiological area.

attribute.name: RadiationInstantAbsorb
attribute.semantics: The generic intensity of Curie (Ci) in the defined (fallout) area. The intensity is not broken down to objects or material types.

attribute.name: NuclearYield
attribute.semantics: Where 7xxy = xx * 10^y equivalent tons of TNT, example: 7126 = 12 * 10^6 tons of TNT or 12 Megatons of TNT.

attribute.name: Isotope
attribute.semantics: The type of agent the DONuclearAgentArea contains.

attribute.name: AltRadiationInstantAbsorb
attribute.semantics: The amount of radiation absorb value in the area, expressed as Gray

objectClass.name: DORadiologicalArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Radiological Area represents an area which holds radiological influence. It may be preceded by a nuclear area, e.g. short/long term aftermaths of a nuclear blast or accident.

attribute.name: RadiologicalType
attribute.semantics: The type of agent the DORadiologicalAgentArea contains. Ref to SISO-REF-010-2015 Enumerations for Simulation Interoperability V21; 17.3.1 Warhead, Munition Descriptor, stating the 4 digit code identifying the agent type, e.g. 7000, in this case the Nuclear

attribute.name: RadiationAbsorbationValue
attribute.semantics: The amount of radiation absorb value in the area, expressed as Gray

attribute.name: AltRadiationAbsorbationValue
attribute.semantics: The amount of radiation absorb value in the area, expressed as rads (US)

objectClass.name: DOEWInfluencingArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Electronic Warfare Infulencing Area is used for visualization of an EW area.

attribute.name: EWInfluencingType
attribute.semantics: A simple model for implementing jamming or spoofing of an area. For the advanced features, one should use the DOJammer Object class.

attribute.name: MinFrequency
attribute.semantics:
The lower range frequency. If MaxFrequency is defined as well, the entire spectrum between min and max are affected.
Note this is the simplified object class. Use DOJammer class for advanced features

attribute.name: MaxFrequency
attribute.semantics:
The upper range frequency. If MinFrequency is defined as well, the entire spectrum between min and max are affected. If not, only the given frequency is affected.
Note this is the simplified object class. Use DOJammer class for advanced features

objectClass.name: DOFeatureArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Feature Area represents a feature area in general.

attribute.name: ActivationTime
attribute.semantics: The instance in time when the area is activated. Time sec. since 1.1.1970 (POSIX)

attribute.name: DeactivationTime
attribute.semantics: The instance in time when the area is deactivated. Time sec. since 1.1.1970 (POSIX)

attribute.name: EngagementTime
attribute.semantics: The duration (sec) the DO has to stay in the area for effect. 0 is instant. E.g. if value is 900, and the area is a repair area, then DO must stay in that area for 15 minutes in order to be fully repaired/supplied/treated/tampered.

attribute.name: ValidFor
attribute.semantics:
What DO faction is able to utilize the feature area. This value may change during ex time due to occupation/takeover by another faction, e.g. a red force may occupy and take control of a blue force repair/supply/treatment area.
Normally, none-influencing areas should be set to valid for all.

objectClass.name: DOAirSpaceManagmentArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Air Space Managment Area represents a volume area of airspace used to visualize and interact with ASM.

attribute.name: AirspaceType
attribute.semantics: Representation of the visual area ASM

objectClass.name: DODecontaminationArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Decontamination Area defines an area which contains means of handling CBRNE.

attribute.name: DecontaminationAreaType
attribute.semantics: Type of DecontaminationArea

attribute.name: Description
attribute.semantics: Description of the decontamination area

objectClass.name: DOMedicalAttendanceArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Medical Attendance Area describes a medical handling area.

attribute.name: MedicalAreaType
attribute.semantics: Type of treatment/handling area

objectClass.name: DOSupplyArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Supply Area rearms all DOs in the area if active and valid for the DO.

attribute.name: AssignedTo
attribute.semantics: The assigned to attribute is used for mobile supplies (e.g. supply trucks, ammo carriers etc.)

objectClass.name: DORepairArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Repair Area represents a repair area that DOs may enter and be repaired. It may be a mobile area; dynamically attached to a DO, or a static area.

attribute.name: AssignedTo
attribute.semantics: The assigned to attribute is used for mobile repair (e.g. repair trucks, engineer vehicles etc.)

attribute.name: RepairType
attribute.semantics: The DO type the area will support

objectClass.name: DORestrictedArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Restricted Area represents an (environmental) restricted area.

attribute.name: RestrictedAreaType
attribute.semantics: Environmental restrictions for certain types of DOs

attribute.name: Description
attribute.semantics: Reason why if area has restrictions

attribute.name: RestrictedType
attribute.semantics: What kind of DOs is the area restricted for.

objectClass.name: DONoFireArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object No Fire Aream is an administrative area for AAR purposes, and it is up to the EXCON how to deal with violations of the no fire area.

attribute.name: NoFireAreaType
attribute.semantics: No fire area type

attribute.name: Description
attribute.semantics: A brief description of the area and the reason for nofire, e.g. church, reservation etc.

objectClass.name: DOFireSupportArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Fire Support Area represents a fire support area.

attribute.name: ShooterID
attribute.semantics: The identification of the DO that executes the fire support mission. However, it can also be unit identification, since a fire mission may be executed by one or more mortars, artillery guns, rocket launchers or airborne platforms. When applicable, it is used for monitoring purposes

attribute.name: MunitionType
attribute.semantics: The type of ammunition used in the fire mission.

attribute.name: NumberReceivedSalvos
attribute.semantics: Artillery is typically fired in layers: a number of guns fire, reload and fire again. This parameter is the number of salvos in the fire mission. This is seen from the target point of view: the number of times a series of shells explodes roughly simultaneously. When artillery uses techniques like Multiple Rounds Simultaneous Impact (MRSI), a gun can fire several times consecutively, but the rounds impact at the same time, thus making up one received salvo. At each receiving salvo, the DOs can be engaged again."

attribute.name: RndsPrSalvo
attribute.semantics: The number of shells per salvo. It is assumed the shells are evenly spread over the fire support target area, so from this parameter the density can be inferred (and thus the probability of being hit).

attribute.name: Trajectory
attribute.semantics: To have the ability to present different type of trajectories for indirect fire.

objectClass.name: DOWeaponEffectModificationArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Weapon Effect Modification Area represents a weapon effect modifier area, mainly to reduce effects of certain munitions fired into the area.

attribute.name: WeaponEffectModifierType
attribute.semantics: Type of terrain features that will influence munition effectiveness. Note that this may change during ex runtime, due to influences in the area. E.g. trees may be removed due to heavy fire and should no longer influence the area.

attribute.name: ReductionValue
attribute.semantics: The number of reduction for each DO in percentage. I.e. Hit/kill probability factor reduced by a percentage value.

objectClass.name: DOPrisonerHoldingArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Prisoner Holding Area represents a POW holding area.

attribute.name: PrisonerHoldingAreaType
attribute.semantics: Type of POW holding area

objectClass.name: DOWeatherArea
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Weather Area enables the defining of a local weather area.

attribute.name: Temperature
attribute.semantics: Measured in Centigrade degrees

attribute.name: Humidity
attribute.semantics: Measured in relative humidity percentage

attribute.name: AirPressure
attribute.semantics: Measured in hPa

attribute.name: WindDirection
attribute.semantics: Measured in directional degrees, airflow moving to direction.

attribute.name: WindSpeed
attribute.semantics: Measured in km/h

attribute.name: Precipiation
attribute.semantics: Measured in mm pr. square meter pr. hour.

attribute.name: Opacity
attribute.semantics: Haze/Visible light factor measured in percent of light passed through an area, where 0% is no loss of light/visible rays and 100% all rays blocked.

attribute.name: CloudBase
attribute.semantics: Measured in meters above sea level - MASL

attribute.name: CloudCeiling
attribute.semantics: Measured in meters above sea level - MASL

attribute.name: CloudDensity
attribute.semantics: Gram of water per cubic square meter

attribute.name: Visibility
attribute.semantics: Is measured in meters of visibility of the visible light

attribute.name: Global
attribute.semantics: If several global weather areas are defined, it is the latest one that is valid. A local area (false) will take precedence of a global area.

objectClass.name: DOBuilding
objectClass.semantics: The dynamic object Building is an entity of type building. State attribute informal only.

attribute.name: CBRNContaminated
attribute.semantics: Building DO is contaminated but still operational, can be recovered by decontamination. Decontamination is possible by staying in decontamination area (DODecontaminationArea), by umpire, or by EXCON. DOs entering building are contaminated. A building DO inside a contaminated area is not by default contaminated, and this attribute should be set to false if so. A building may for instance give shelter for radiological contamination...

attribute.name: CBRNArea
attribute.semantics: What area the DO has been contaminated by. The area identifier is used if necessary to reference the CBRN attributes.

attribute.name: State
attribute.semantics: Advanced damage state of infrastructure objects

interactionClass.name: DOJammerEngagement
interactionClass.semantics: The dynamic object Jammer Engagement interaction communicates information associated with the jamming or spoofing activity of an area.

parameter.name: EWInfluenceAreaIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Optional attribute. Related area of jamming.

parameter.name: JammerIdentifier
parameter.semantics: If a jammer is modelled as a separate DO, it has its own ID and its own location.

parameter.name: CarrierIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The identification of the DO that carries a jammer.

interactionClass.name: DORepairActivity
interactionClass.semantics: The dynamic object Repair Activity interaction communicates information associated with a repairing activity.

parameter.name: RepairerIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the DO that performs the repair activity. This is required to determine if the DO is permitted or has the capability to perform the repair activity. Also for analytical and monitoring purposes the IDs of the involved DOs are required.

parameter.name: StartingTime
parameter.semantics: The instance in time when the repair activity starts and is mainly used for monitoring purposes.

parameter.name: RepairDuration
parameter.semantics: The duration in seconds of how long the repair activity will take to become into effect. This can be zero, to immediately change the damage status of the affected DO. In practice, the duration of a repair activity is generally measured in minutes, rather than seconds.

parameter.name: AffectedDOIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the DO to be repaired.

parameter.name: RepairAreaIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Optional attribute. Related Repair Area.

interactionClass.name: DOMedicalAttendance
interactionClass.semantics: The dynamic object Medical Attendance interaction communicates information associated with a medical activity.

parameter.name: MedicDOIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the DO that performs the medical activity.

parameter.name: MedicalActivityIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The activity identification of the performed medical activity.

parameter.name: StartingTime
parameter.semantics: The instance in time when the medical treatment starts and is mainly used for monitoring purposes.

parameter.name: TreatmentDuration
parameter.semantics: The duration in seconds of how long the medical activity will take to become into effect.

parameter.name: AffectedDOIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the DO to be treated.

parameter.name: MedicalAttendanceAreaIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Optional attribute. Related Medical Treatment Area.

interactionClass.name: DOSupplyActivity
interactionClass.semantics: The dynamic object Supply Activity interaction communicates information associated with a resupply activity.

parameter.name: SupplierDOIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the DO that performs the resupply activity.

parameter.name: StartingTime
parameter.semantics: The instance in time when the resupply activity starts and is mainly used for monitoring purposes.

parameter.name: SupplyDuration
parameter.semantics: The duration in seconds of how long the resupply activity will take to become into effect.

parameter.name: AffectedDOIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the DO to be resupplied.

parameter.name: SupplyAreaIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Optional attribute. Related Supply Area.

interactionClass.name: DOObserverControllerEngagement
interactionClass.semantics: The dynamic object Observer/Controller engagement interaction communicates information associated with an Observer/Controller engagement activity.

parameter.name: ObserverControllerIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The identification of the O/C that initiates the engagement.

parameter.name: ObserverControllerCode
parameter.semantics: Specifies the O/C ammunition code.

parameter.name: AffectedDOIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the affected DO.

interactionClass.name: DORequestNewStatus
interactionClass.semantics: The dynamic object Request new status interaction communicates information associated with a DO damage state change request.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the DO Status Change Request.

parameter.name: NewDamageState
parameter.semantics: Specifies the new damage state.

parameter.name: AdvancedPlatformDamageState
parameter.semantics: The new extended damage state for platform entities.

parameter.name: AdvancedLifeformDamageState
parameter.semantics: The new extended damage state for lifeform entities.

parameter.name: AffectedDOIdentifiers
parameter.semantics: An array of affected DO Identifiers.

parameter.name: MountedOnPlatform
parameter.semantics: Indicates if the DO is mounted on platform (e.g. tank)

parameter.name: CBRNEContaminated
parameter.semantics: DO is contaminated.

parameter.name: CBRNEAreaObjectID
parameter.semantics: What area the DO has been contaminated by. The area identifier is used if necessary to reference the CBRN attributes.

interactionClass.name: DORequestORBATChange
interactionClass.semantics: The dynamic object Request ORBAT Change interaction communicates information associated with a DO ORBAT change request.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the DO ORBAT Change Request.

parameter.name: NewAffiliation
parameter.semantics: Specifies the new affiliation.

parameter.name: NewParent
parameter.semantics: Identifies the new parent in the ORBAT.

parameter.name: AffectedDOIdentifiers
parameter.semantics: An array of affected DO Identifiers.

interactionClass.name: DORequestPositionChange
interactionClass.semantics: The dynamic object Request Position Change interaction communicates information associated with a DO position change request.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Identifies the DO Position Change Request.

parameter.name: NewPosition
parameter.semantics: Specifies the new position.

parameter.name: Indoors
parameter.semantics: Only for DOPlayer objects: The position of the DO is indoors (only low quality or no GPS available). Default value is false.

parameter.name: AffectedDOIdentifiers
parameter.semantics: An array of affected DO Identifiers.

interactionClass.name: DODecontaminationActivity
interactionClass.semantics: The dynamic object Decontamination Activity interaction communicates information associated with a decontamination activity.

parameter.name: DecontaminationDOIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the DO that performs the decontamination activity.

parameter.name: StartingTime
parameter.semantics: The instance in time when the decontamination activity starts and is mainly used for monitoring purposes.

parameter.name: DecontaminationDuration
parameter.semantics: The duration in seconds of how long the decontamination activity will take to become into effect.

parameter.name: AffectedDOIdentifier
parameter.semantics: The ID of the DO to be resupplied.

parameter.name: DecontaminationAreaIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Optional attribute: Related Decontamination Area.
